blocked_on: Scripted pick lift still fails. P1 (swap to NVIDIA Robotiq USD) tried and ruled out -- USD reference composition hits nested-rigid-body + broken joint path errors; Isaac Lab combines arm+gripper via USD variants, not references. Reverted to RIA gripper USD with stiffness=5000/damping=100/effort=50 (the only combo that reliably holds OPEN during the arm swing with our URDF-derived asset). Recommendation: pursue P2 (fix DCV viewport freeze and do human teleop) next session.
notes: This session iterated across 9 scripted-pick config variants + P1 NVIDIA USD swap attempt + 3 gain-tuning variants. All Phase 7 findings consolidated in reports/phase_7_findings.md. Concrete paths forward: P2 teleop (primary), P3 author HC10DT USD with gripper variant, P4 rewrite compose script with flatten+xformstack fix, P5 inspect pad collision geometry once viewport is working.
